response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial contributions, they lack direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing/navigation systems, show no evidence of distributed systems or geospatial tiling work, and their primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang — none of which align with the core requirement of modern C++ for routing tile pipelines.
strengths: Built open-source GIS platform with real-world usage (GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Strong track record of contributing to testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in commercial routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or low-latency data tile processing
Geospatial work is primarily in DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux routing tile stack
